title: clinopodium annuum
intro: Clinopodium annuum, also known as wild basil or purple sage, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium annuum include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and improved respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
